summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Non-security open PRs are preserved for maintainer or author follow-up; the one security-sensitive candidate is routed to central security handling. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR-raising action is planned.

actions.reason: Useful open maintainer PR with no duplicate/superseded evidence and merge is blocked by job frontmatter.
Clear linked fix candidate for a hydrated issue, but this job cannot merge or close fixed-by-candidate and no dedupe close is appropriate.
Clear linked fix candidate for a hydrated issue, but proof/status review remains a maintainer path and merge/close actions are unavailable in plan mode.
Useful linked fix candidate with contributor credit preserved by keeping the PR open; merge and fixed-by-candidate closeout are not allowed by this job.
Large maintainer-owned documentation/comment sweep should remain open for maintainer review; it is not a duplicate or closeout candidate in this inventory shard.
Active contributor PR with useful code and unresolved review/check history; preserve it for author/maintainer follow-up rather than closing or merging.
Security-boundary feed search/defaults work is out of ProjectClownfish cleanup scope and should be handled by central OpenClaw security review.
Narrow linked docs PR should stay open, but failed real behavior proof blocks any fixed-by-candidate closeout or merge-style recommendation.
Useful open feature PR with no duplicate/superseded evidence; keep it for assigned maintainer review since merge is blocked by job frontmatter.
Potential follow-up/narrow variant should stay open for proof; failed proof and checks block closure or fixed-by-candidate handling.
